name: agent:fixable
description: Agent has analyzed this and can auto-fix safely

name: agent:in-progress
description: Agent is actively working on this item

name: agent:pr
description: PR created by the automation loop - eligible for analyzer review

name: agent:pause
description: Agent halted; issue needs human intervention before retry

name: agent:human-required
description: Fix exceeds safe automation boundary - human must own this

name: agent:escalated
description: Escalated after repeated failures; senior review needed

name: analyzer:blocked
description: One or more analyzers found blocking issues in this PR

name: human:ready-for-review
description: PR is ready for human review and merge decision

name: risk:trivial
description: Zero-risk: formatting, typos, doc updates

name: risk:low
description: Low-risk: dependency bumps, safe refactors

name: risk:medium
description: Medium-risk: logic changes, new features

name: risk:high
description: High-risk: auth, payments, data migrations

name: risk:critical
description: Critical: security, PII, compliance-adjacent

name: pr:cycle-1
description: PR has been through 1 analyze-fix cycle

name: pr:cycle-2
description: PR has been through 2 analyze-fix cycles

name: pr:cycle-3
description: PR has been through 3 analyze-fix cycles (max)

name: source:repo-audit
description: Generated by repo-audit workflow

name: source:jira
description: Normalized from Jira ticket

name: source:github-issue
description: Created from an existing GitHub issue

name: source:manual
description: Manually created by developer

name: report
description: Informational output only - automation must not act on this

name: action-item
description: Actionable item - automation will process and generate a PR

name: feature-request
description: Feature request - created via sfl-add-issue prompt

name: no-agent
description: Opt this issue out of all Set it Free automation
